target: 17. Infected from the Beginning…

Ah.

No problem!
Koba-chan~?
Koba-chan~?

(The TV is still on, the meal is untouched…
it's clearly too suspicious…)
Hmm… this is…

(A shadow… this is the shadow's doing!!)
Damn it, I couldn't make it in time!

(The worst scenario was already imagined.

(…Idiot!

(The only thing I can do is warn and…)
(…carefully observe the situation…)
(…and what exactly can be learned from that observation?)

(The food is untouched and cold…
from the beer, it seems they were attacked yesterday…

(Other than that…)

(A depression in the floor?
…There's one over there too?!

(There are multiple marks that look like they were punched with great force.
What the hell happened here?)

(…There are two black stains.

(It's probably Shiori-chan's parents)
(Then… where is Shiori-chan?!

Shizuka-san!

Huh~!

(It's dark…
are the shutters closed?)

The lights are…

Hey.
(…This… this voice…)

Why yesterday…

(…Ah… I see… …)

(The first and second funerals, I didn't do it

(It was… telling Shiori-chan about the shadow…)

Stare at me…

(…The shadow that sneaked into the funeral…

…Ah…

Anyway, about my question--

(From the first funeral… <color=#GF_KEY_SNP_KANSEN>many times</color>…)
Shinpei-kun?

What happened?
Ah… no, that is…
